summary: Implementation updates `renderInterventionQuestionComment` to the dashboard-style header and fenced `/factory answer` command blocks; unit tests were updated and CI (workflow id 23441794083) shows unit tests passed.

evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: test 'renderInterventionQuestionComment renders concise header with per-option fences' asserts header lines, recommended option, run link, fenced code blocks, and metadata comment.

scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: implementation constructs header lines including human-action line, optional Summary, Question ID, Recommended, and Run link, followed by '### Answer With' and per-option fenced blocks.
CI workflow 23441794083: unit tests succeeded (unit: success).
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: test 'renderInterventionQuestionComment handles missing optional values' asserts absent Summary/Recommended/Run and presence of '_No answers available._' and metadata.
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: code omits lines when summary/recommended/run are empty and preserves spacing rules via final filter to remove consecutive blank lines.
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: test 'renderInterventionQuestionComment handles missing optional values' includes an options-empty case and asserts '_No answers available._'.
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: branch that pushes '_No answers available._' when options.length is 0.

requirement_checks.requirement: Preserve serialized metadata comment and option ordering
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: metadata JSON parsed and validated in tests (checks id, type, version, status, optionIds ordering).
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: metadata built via JSON.stringify({ id, type, version, status, optionIds }) and appended as '<!-- factory-question: ... -->'.

requirement_checks.requirement: Update `renderInterventionQuestionComment` and unit tests to assert new layout
evidence: git diff (last commit) shows changes to 'scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs' and 'tests/github-messages.test.mjs'.
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: multiple new/updated tests asserting new header and answer layout.

findings.title: Add explicit runUrl-only test
findings.details: There is robust coverage for runId+runUrl and runId-absent cases, but an explicit unit test for the case where only runUrl is present (and runId is empty) would make the formatting branch clearer and protect future refactors.
findings.recommendation: Add a unit test exercising 'runUrl present but runId empty' and assert the exact 'Run: [GitHub Actions run](<url>)' formatting.
